title: The Twisted One
description: This Mod adds demons to the game that will hunt you in sight so beware of these dangers
body:
The mod adds demons that look alike, There goal is to hunt down the player This mod is called the twisted one because that is the demon's name
     lessons:
Speed. 1.5
Health. Unknown
Size. 2 blocks

this demon has 3 heads and 2 legs and a chest and no arms They hunt down Players Because they taste yummy. They will scare the CR*P out of you and there is no safe place at night.
